scores.notes: Company name correctly extracted but address has multiple errors (e.g., 'IDEDAR' vs 'DEDAP', 'BABRU' vs 'BAHRU'). Date is garbled ('25/120018' vs '25/12/2018'). Numeric total '80.90' appears but with inconsistent formatting and extra digits elsewhere. Table structure is mostly lost with scattered and unclear columns/rows. Layout and reading order are poor with many unrelated or garbled lines. Most ground truth fields are present but with significant errors.
